revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-5-090

A light which is in service during those winter months when the regular light is extinguished.

It is of lower intensity than the regular light but usually of the same character.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Winter Light (U.S.A.)}}
